# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - api.anotherthirdparty.com
  addresses:
  - 192.0.2.0/24
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: api.thirdparty.com
  - address: api.anotherthirdparty.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - api.anotherthirdparty.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /v1
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 80
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /v2
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.anotherthirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.externaldb.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.0/24
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: db.externaldb.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.externaldb.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.externaldb.com
        port:
          number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-restriction
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        hosts: ["api.thirdparty.com", "api.anotherthirdparty.com", "db.externaldb.com"]
